fasta.title: Reference Genome (FASTA)
fasta.description: Nucleotide sequence of the reference genome used for alignment

gtf.title: Reference Genome (GTF)
gtf.description: Gene annotations for the reference genome in GTF format

ensembl_gtf.title: Ensembl GTF (for JCAST)
ensembl_gtf.description: Ensembl-format GTF file required for JCAST protein translation (must have transcript_type attribute)

group_column.title: Metadata Group Column
group_column.description: Column from metadata containing group assignments ('group1' or 'group2') for differential splicing analysis

read_length.title: Read Length
read_length.description: RNA-seq read length for rMATS analysis

sjdb_overhang.title: STAR - sjdbOverhang
sjdb_overhang.description: Length of genomic sequence around annotated junction for splice junction database (typically read_length - 1)

genome_sa_index_nbases.title: STAR - genomeSAindexNbases
genome_sa_index_nbases.description: Length of SA pre-indexing string (typically 10-15, scales with genome size)

rmats_anchor_length.title: rMATS - Anchor Length
rmats_anchor_length.description: Minimum number of nucleotides at junction ends for rMATS

rmats_novel_splice_sites.title: rMATS - Novel Splice Sites
rmats_novel_splice_sites.description: Enable detection of unannotated splice sites

rmats_cstat.title: rMATS - cstat Cutoff
rmats_cstat.description: Cutoff splicing difference for statistical testing

jcast_min_read_count.title: JCAST - Min Read Count
jcast_min_read_count.description: Minimum junction read count for JCAST translation

jcast_qvalue_min.title: JCAST - Min Q-value
jcast_qvalue_min.description: Minimum FDR q-value threshold for JCAST filtering

jcast_qvalue_max.title: JCAST - Max Q-value
jcast_qvalue_max.description: Maximum FDR q-value threshold for JCAST filtering

jcast_splice_types.title: JCAST - Splice Types (Optional)
jcast_splice_types.description: Comma-separated splice types to include (MXE,RI,SE,A3SS,A5SS). Leave blank for all types.

star_cpu.title: STAR - CPUs
star_cpu.description: Number of CPUs for STAR alignment tasks

star_memory_gb.title: STAR - Memory (GB)
star_memory_gb.description: Amount of RAM for STAR alignment tasks

rmats_cpu.title: rMATS - CPUs
rmats_cpu.description: Number of CPUs for rMATS task

rmats_memory_gb.title: rMATS - Memory (GB)
rmats_memory_gb.description: Amount of RAM for rMATS task

jcast_cpu.title: JCAST - CPUs
jcast_cpu.description: Number of CPUs for JCAST task

jcast_memory_gb.title: JCAST - Memory (GB)
jcast_memory_gb.description: Amount of RAM for JCAST task

workflow_failure_mode.title: Workflow Failure Mode
workflow_failure_mode.description: Behavior when individual tasks encounter failures
